title: For-in vs For-each in Swift
summary: For-in and for-each are different variants of for loops in swift which are used to iterate over a range, set or dictionary. Both provide the same functionality but has a few limitations or differences when it comes to conditional access.
content: For-in and for-each are different variants of for loops in swift which are used to iterate over a range, set or dictionary. Both provide the same functionality but has a few limitations or differences when it comes to conditional access.
